attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.PDB_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.SALES_ORDER_KEY, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.ITEM_KEY, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.OVERALL_ELIGIBLE_FLAG, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.BOOKING_ACCRUAL_AMOUNT, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.PARTNER_COUNTRY_OVERRIDE_KEY, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.REBATE_TYPE, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.ALLOCATION_NODE, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.PROGRAM_HIERARCHY_KEY, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.CREATED_BY, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.CREATED_DATE, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.UPDATED_BY, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.UPDATED_DATE, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E,
 (
 select BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,REBATE_TYPE ,ALLOCATION_NODE ,FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER ,PROGRAM_HIERARCHY_KEY ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E
 minus
 select BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,REBATE_TYPE ,ALLOCATION_NODE ,FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER ,PROGRAM_HIERARCHY_KEY ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.PPI_REBATE_FACT_E
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
 and ACM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE 
 and ACM.REBATE_TYPE = STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.REBATE_TYPE 
 and ACM.ALLOCATION_NODE=STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.ALLOCATION_NODE and 
 ACM.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER = STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER 
 and ACM.PROGRAM_HIERARCHY_KEY=STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.PROGRAM_HIERARCHY_KEY
 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_PPI_REBATE_FACT_E.REFRESH_DATETIME
